dct_description_sm:
Appears in: Ramusio's Delle Navigationi et Viaggi nel qual si Contiene les Descrittione
        dele Africa.

Interior includes mountains, trees, natives, Castel de la Mina (Portuguese fort known
        for exporting gold), an elephant, camel, monkey and a lion. The seas are engraved in
        horizontal wavy lines and are decorated with paddling canoes, sea monsters and ships. Top
        right: 370. Top left: 371.
dct_rights_sm: Image from the Dr. Oscar I. Norwich collection of maps of Africa and its islands, 1486 - ca. 1865 courtesy Stanford University Libraries. This item is in the public domain. There are no restrictions on use. If you have questions, please contact the David Rumsey Map Center at rumseymapcenter@stanford.edu.
